person.name: Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Marguerite d'Enghien, suo jure Countess of Brienne and of Conversano, suo jure Heiress of Enghien, and Lady of Beauvois (born 1365), was a wealthy noblewoman from the County of Hainaut in her own right, having inherited the counties of Brienne and of Conversano, and the Lordship of Enghien from her father Louis of Enghien on 17 March 1394. She was the wife of John of Luxembourg, Sire of Beauvois and the mother of Peter of Luxembourg, Count of Saint-Pol, Count of Brienne and of Conversano who inherited her fiefs, and John II of Luxembourg, Count of Ligny.

«b»Family and lineage«/b»
Marguerite was born in 1365, the eldest daughter of Louis of Enghien, Count of Brienne and of Conversano, Lord of Enghien, Titular Duke of Athens, and Giovanna of Sanseverino. She had three younger sisters, Yolande, Helene, and Isabelle. On 3 May 1384, Yolande married Philip of Bar (born 1372), who died in a Turkish prison in 1404 after being taken prisoner following the disastrous Battle of Nicopolis in 1396. Marguerite had a brother, Antoine who died at the age of sixteen, leaving her, the eldest daughter, heir to her father's estates and titles. Her paternal grandparents were Walter III of Enghien and Isabella of Brienne, and her maternal grandparents were Antonio of Sanseverino, 5th Count of Marsico, and Isabella del Balzo.

«b»Marriages and issue«/b»
On an unknown date, Marguerite married her first husband, Pierre de Baux, and following his death, she married as her second husband, a relative of her mother, Giacopo of Sanseverino. Both of these early marriages were childless. In 1380, after Giacopo's death, Marguerite married her third husband, John of Luxembourg, Sire of Beauvois (1370-1397). He was the son of Guy of Luxembourg, Count of Saint-Pol and Mahaut of Châtillon, Countess of Saint-Pol. By her third husband, Marguerite had five children:

1.) Peter of Luxembourg (1390- 31 August 1433), Count of Saint-Pol (1430), which he inherited from his aunt Jeanne of Luxembourg, Countess of Saint-Pol and Ligny; he also inherited, on an unknown date, Marguerite's fiefs of Brienne and of Conversano, thus becoming Count of Brienne and of Conversano. He married on 8 May 1405, Margaret de Baux, by whom he had nine children, including Jacquetta of Luxembourg, mother of Elizabeth Woodville Queen-Consort of Edward IV of England.

2.) John II of Luxembourg, Count of Ligny (1392- 5 January 1441), inherited the title of Beauvois from his father, and the title of Ligny from his aunt, Jeanne of Luxembourg. On 23 November 1418, married Jeanne de Béthune, widow of Robert of Bar, Count of Marle and Soissons who had been killed at the Battle of Agincourt on 25 October 1415. John, who was an ally of the English during the Hundred Years War, received Joan of Arc as his prisoner, and subsequently sold her to the English for 10,000 livres.

3.) Louis of Luxembourg (died 18 September 1443). He was a statesman and a high-ranking churchman. His posts and clerical titles included Cardinal (1439), Archbishop of Rouen (1437), Chancellor of France (1425), Governor of Paris (1436), Bishop of Thérouanne, Administrator of Ely (1437), Bishop of Frascati (1442). He was buried in Ely Cathedral.

4.) Catherine of Luxembourg (born c.1393)

5.) Jeanne of Luxembourg (died 1420), married firstly, on 8 September 1415, Louis, Seigneur de Ghistelles (killed at the Battle of Agincourt); she married secondly on 28 October 1419, Jean IV, Viscount of Melun, Constable of Flanders.

«b»Inheritance«/b»
Marguerite became the suo jure Countess of Brienne and Conversano, and Dame of Enghien upon her father's death on 17 March 1394. Her husband John also became Count of Brienne and of Conversano by right of his wife.

She died on an unknown date sometime after 1394. Her will was dated 19 September 1393. Her eldest son, Peter received her titles of Brienne and of Conversano.

Through her son Peter and his wife, Margaret de Baux, Marguerite was an ancestress of Queen consort Elizabeth Woodville and her siblings, King Henry VIII of England, and King Henry IV of France. Every English monarch after 1509 descended from her. Modern-day descendants include HM Queen Elizabeth II, the former Princess of Wales, Lady Diana, Lady Shirley, the Duchess of Cornwall, and the former Duchess of York.

zh.Naples, Napoli, Campania, Italy: 義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne於大約1372年出生在盧森堡時，她的父親Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne33歲，母親Giovanna Di San Severino33歲。她於1390年之前與Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1393年9月13日在義大利普格利亞巴里享年22歲。

zh-hans.Naples, Napoli, Campania, Italy: 意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne于大约1372年出生在卢森堡时，她的父亲Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne33岁，母亲Giovanna Di San Severino33岁。她于1390年之前与Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1393年9月13日在意大利普格利亞巴里享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne was born about 1372, in Luxembourg, her father, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, was 33 and her mother, Giovanna Di San Severino, was 33. She married Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol before 1390. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 September 1393, in Bari, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne est née environ 1372, à Luxembourg, son père, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Giovanna Di San Severino, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol avant 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1393, à Bari, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne um 1372 in Luxemburg geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne 33 und ihre Mutter Giovanna Di San Severino 33. Sie hat vor 1390 Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. September 1393 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Bari, Puglia, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne è nata il circa 1372 nel Lussemburgo, sua padre, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Giovanna Di San Severino, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol prima del 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1393, nel Bari, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienneが約1372年にルクセンブルクで生まれた時，父Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienneは33歳，母Giovanna Di San Severinoは33歳であった。1390年以前にJean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1393年9月13日にイタリアプウグリアバーイで22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne(이)가 대략 1372년 룩셈부르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Giovanna Di San Severino(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1390년 이전 Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 9월 13일 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Luxemburgo, seu pai, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Giovanna Di San Severino, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol antes 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1393, em Bari, Puglia, Itália, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne родилась около 1372 г. в местности Люксембург, её отцу по имени Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Giovanna Di San Severino, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol перед 1390 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 сентября 1393 г. в местности бари, пугля, Италия в возрасте 22 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne nació aproximadamente 1372, en Luxemburgo, su papá, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Giovanna Di San Severino, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol antes de 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1393, en Bari, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 22 años.
